meaning: n.别致的款式(尤指妇女的服饰)adj.别致的
examples: She is always so chic, so elegant.
Her gown was very French and very chic.
Sony has cornered the market in chic-looking MP3 players.
Adam Byatt's chic Trinity Restaurant in Clapham is perfect for an evening out with friends.
The chic lobby features modern seating with international power outlets discreetly placed at the base of each.
